calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 21, 2016, in Department 525:
Christie Smart and Allyson Smart, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as Propria Persona.
Brandon Tang, Esq.,(510-896-9411) Specially appearance for Appellants/Defendants Laus Investment Group, etal and Sophie Lau/owner, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondents/Plaintiffs, Christie Smart and Allyson Smart testify on their own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

Appellant/Defendant, Sophie Lau testifies on her own behalf under the direction of Mr. Tang and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - photos, lease agreement, cleaning invoice, letters, etc.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly unmarked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr. ; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Nov-19-15 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
